tipRules.tip: Wheeler: Small swimbaits (CrushCity Mayor) on ball head jigs are his go-to for prespawn bass staging in deeper water near spawning pockets
Wheeler: Use a Ned rig as one of several presentations to cycle through when targeting deep prespawn staging bass

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: As temps flirt with the 50s, target traditional staging areas close to spawning pockets; deeper staging fish focus more on feeding than spawning activities, making prespawn the most consistent action of the year
Wheeler: Transitional banks and creek arms are prime prespawn locations; use electronics to scan deeper pockets and channel swings near spawning grounds for actively feeding fish
Wheeler: Be versatile during prespawn — cycle through finesse swimbaits, Ned rigs, and heavy gliding jigs to determine the best technique for current conditions

Wheeler: Forward-facing sonar has opened up offshore prespawn tactics, but don't overlook traditional fishing techniques — instinct and experience through 'just fishing' will always reveal bass that evade fish finder technology
Wheeler: For prespawn swimbaits use a 7' medium-fast spinning rod with 12-pound Sufix NanoBraid mainline and 8-pound fluorocarbon leader
